extract: Deoxys (Japanese: デオキシス Deoxys) is a Psychic-type Mythical Pokémon introduced in Generation III. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Deoxys has four forms: Normal Forme, Attack Forme, Defense Forme, and Speed Forme. It can change between its forms by interacting with certain meteorites. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Form data for these details.) Deoxys is associated with Rayquaza, with the two often being in conflict. It is the last Pokémon in the Hoenn Pokédex.
